benefits.description: Already feeling full after eating less. Way less food intake.

protocol_notes: 30mg vial reconstituted with 3ml BAC water = 10mg/ml concentration. Using 1ml insulin syringes; 25 units = 2.5mg starting dose. Plans to escalate to 4mg after 4 weeks. Received vial from neighbor who decided not to use it. Branded for 'research purposes only.' Considering purchasing from different vendor in future with higher concentration mix.
